content.text: One modified file. Let me also check for any other repos/programs that should be synced.

arguments.command:
# Check agent repos for uncommitted changes
for dir in /Users/landonking/openclaw-army/agents/*/; do
  agent=$(basename "$dir")
  if [ -d "$dir/.git" ]; then
    changes=$(cd "$dir" && git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -3)
    if [ -n "$changes" ]; then
      echo "=== $agent ===" 
      echo "$changes"
    fi
  fi
done

# Check if there are other program directories to sync
ls -d /Users/landonking/*/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v -E '(openclaw|\.cache|\.npm|\.nvm|\.local|\.config|\.ssh|\.gnupg|Library|Desktop|Documents|Downloads|Movies|Music|Pictures|Public|Applications)' | head -20

arguments.command:
# Check other git repos for changes
for dir in /Users/landonking/hermes-agent /Users/landonking/ralph-v2 /Users/landonking/VisionClaw /Users/landonking/projects/*/; do
  if [ -d "$dir/.git" ]; then
    name=$(basename "$dir")
    changes=$(cd "$dir" && git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -5)
    if [ -n "$changes" ]; then
      echo "=== $name ($dir) ==="
      echo "$changes"
    fi
  fi
done 2>/dev/null

content.text: Now let me commit and push the main openclaw-army repo, and handle the agent sub-repos:

arguments.command: cd /Users/landonking/openclaw-army && git commit -m "cron sync: audit.jsonl update — $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z')" && git push origin main 2>&1

# Handle agent repos with changes - commit and push
for agent in infra-worker legal-worker product-worker; do
  dir="/Users/landonking/openclaw-army/agents/$agent"
  if [ -d "$dir/.git" ]; then
    echo "=== $agent ==="
    cd "$dir"
    git add -A 2>/dev/null
    git commit -m "cron sync: initial setup — $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z')" 2>&1 | tail -2
    git push 2>&1 | tail -3
  fi
done
